title: periphanes strumosa
intro: Periphanes strumosa is a type of plant that belongs to the family of Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Periphanes strumosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Periphanes strumosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
